innateAbility.name: Suffer In Silence
innateAbility.description: Grants Silencer outgoing damage amplification against silenced units.Inversely, incoming damage sources from silenced units are less effective on Silencer.

abilities.name: Arcane Curse
abilities.description: Applies a curse on affected enemy units within the radius, dealing damage over time and slowing their movement speed.

abilities.name: Glaives of Wisdom
abilities.description: Each attack drains and grants the affected enemy hero's intelligence to Silencer.The attack deals additional damage corresponding to Silencer's current intelligence.

abilities.name: Last Word
abilities.description: Enchants an enemy unit while granting vision over it.Deals damage corresponding to the intelligence difference between Silencer and the affected unit.

abilities.name: Global Silence
abilities.description: Stops all sounds, preventing enemy heroes and units on the map from casting abilities.

talents.left: +2s Arcane Curse Base Duration+1s Arcane Curse Penalty Duration
